title: Carpet Discarpet
description: Fabric carpet extension that adds discord functionality to scarpet
body: # Discarpet [](https://fabricmc.net/) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/discarpet) [](https://github.com/replaceitem) [](https://replaceitem.github.io/carpet-discarpet/) [](https://discord.gg/etTDQAVSgt) ## A Carpet extension for discord bot functionality ![Discarpet](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/replaceitem/carpet-discarpet/master/src/main/resources/assets/discarpet/icon.png) This is an extension for [fabric-carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet) that adds parts of the Discord bot API as [scarpet](https://github.com/gnembon/fabric-carpet/wiki/Scarpet) functions. This allows you to code Discord bots that run within Minecraft, and interact with the Minecraft world. **Requires [Carpet mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)**
